title: Public safety-source status as of June 12, 2026
summary: Most public safety data sources currently available in the app showed no major platform change that should materially reduce freshness or availability. The clearest public updates came from Australia's TGA, which posted a June 3, 2026 notice about a historical field issue in older adverse-event records and is also displaying a current notice about dataset and search issues. FDA also published June 2026 eMDR deployment details for June 29, 2026, but did not announce a public change to openFDA device access.
updates: Australia (TGA): On June 3, 2026, TGA said a reported-outcome field may appear blank in older adverse-event records published before October 2019.
Australia (TGA): As of June 12, 2026, TGA was also displaying a public notice that some datasets and search features are experiencing issues.
United States (FDA): FDA published June 2026 eMDR system work scheduled for June 29, 2026; no public change to openFDA device access was announced.
no_major_changes: No meaningful setup or access change was identified for FDA Safety Communications, BfArM, Swissmedic, MHRA, Health Canada, ANVISA, AEMPS, ANSM, PMDA, or the current English-language NMPA coverage.
